title: Method of Steepest Ascent/Descent Algorithm Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of the steepest ascent/descent optimization method for finding a local maximum or minimum of a function.
elements: Perform Line Search: Find optimal step size αₖ
relationships: Compute Gradient leads to Determine Search Direction (ascent uses +∇f, descent uses -∇f)
Determine Search Direction leads to Perform Line Search
Perform Line Search leads to Update Solution
Update Solution leads to Convergence Check
If not converged, Convergence Check loops back to Compute Gradient
If converged, Convergence Check leads to Optimal Solution Found
Optimal Solution Found leads to End
